info.title: Pharmacist
info.description:

generate-custom      Generate from own specified assembly paths and search
directories.
generate-platform    Generate from a predetermined platform.
help                 Display more information on a specific command.
version              Display version information.

commands.name: generate-custom
commands.description: Generate from own specified assembly paths and search

options.name: --search-directories
options.description:
Required. Specify a search directories where to
search for additional support libraries.

options.name: --assemblies
options.description: Required. List of assemblies to process.

options.name: --target-framework
options.description:
Required. Specify the Target framework to extract
for.

options.name: --output-path
options.description:
Required. The directory path where to output the
contents.

options.name: --output-prefix
options.description:
Required. Specify a prefix for the output file
based on the platforms selected. Each platform
output file will contain this prefix.

options.name: --target-frameworks
options.description: Required. Specify the target framework monikiers.

options.name: --is-wpf
options.description: Specify if WPF libraries should be used.

options.name: --is-winforms
options.description: Specify if WinForms libraries should be used.

options.name: --reference
options.description:
Specify a Reference Assemblies location to override
the default.

options.name: --output-path
options.description:
Required. The directory path where to output the
contents.

options.name: --output-prefix
options.description:
Required. Specify a prefix for the output file
based on the platforms selected. Each platform
output file will contain this prefix.

commands.name: help
commands.description: Display more information on a specific command.
